breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iranian missile hits Jordan's Aqaba Airport, reports Iran state media
breaking.summary: The Israeli military said it had identified and intercepted missiles launched from Iran towards Aqaba in Jordan

breaking.title: US soldier killed and one injured after Iranian attack in Iraq
breaking.summary: The US military reports another death a day after two of its soldiers were killed in Jordan.

breaking.title: At least eight dead, 15 hurt in Nagaland landslide
breaking.summary: Heavy incessant rainfall and a cloudburst caused widespread destruction at various locations in and around Mon town; State announces ex-gratia of ₹4 lakh for kin of deceased, ₹74,000 for each of the injured

breaking.title: Alphabet, Intel in focus as US earnings season gathers steam
breaking.summary: Corporate earnings season is gathering steam with key updates expected soon.  Alphabet and Intel reports will influence the market-leading artificial intelligence trade.  High profit expectations and Iran war uncertainty are currently impacting investor sentiment.  The S&P 500 saw a weekly decline, driven by semiconductor share pullbacks.  However, the benchmark index remains significantly up for the year.

breaking.title: Larry Ellison once struggled to pay his electricity bills. Now, he has written a $300 million cheque to...
breaking.summary: Once grappling with utility bills for his workshop, tech magnate Larry Ellison transformed his fortunes by acquiring 98 percent of a Hawaiian island for a staggering $300 million. Now residing full-time on Lanai, he envisions a luxury destination coupled with a sustainable community. Despite fluctuations in his wealth driven by market trends, Oracle's cloud operations showcase remarkable strength amid ongoing challenges.

breaking.title: Bihar CM opens ₹130.88-cr. link to divert floodwaters, enhance farm productivity
breaking.summary: The link, part of a river interlinking project, will reduce intensity of floods in northern Bihar, says Choudhary; he also inaugurates 551 schools, lists measures to improve education infrastructure
